overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk waterfront district at night. The player descends from a dock platform and walks along a neon-lit canal with futuristic skyscrapers in the background, approaching an NPC standing on the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated dock platform descending to waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp from a red and white dock platform toward the water level

entered.detail: concrete platform with red and white painted barriers and scattered debris
large industrial structure with glowing green neon edges reflecting in the water
dark water surface reflecting neon lights and city illumination
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage against night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated dock platform with red and white painted barriers. The camera descends a concrete ramp toward a dark water canal, with a massive green neon-lit industrial structure visible across the water and a futuristic city skyline looming in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront walkway between water and industrial wall

events.description: camera turns left to follow the curved waterfront path, revealing more of the city skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating along the curved waterfront path with green neon structures on the right and water on the left

entered.detail: green painted metal safety railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Moving along a curved waterfront walkway, the camera turns left to follow the path. The green neon structure shifts to the right side while the water canal moves to the left. The futuristic skyline becomes more prominent as the camera rounds the curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with industrial elements

events.description: a lone figure becomes visible standing ahead near supply crates

agents.ego_description: approaching a lone figure standing near blue supply crates on the waterfront walkway

notable_agents.action: standing still near blue supply crates on the walkway, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large red industrial crane structure with illuminated lights
blue and yellow plastic supply containers stacked near the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The path straightens into an open waterfront promenade with an industrial crane visible on the left. The camera approaches a lone NPC standing near supply crates. The water canal now appears on the right side while the futuristic skyline dominates the left view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated industrial dock down to a neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins by descending a concrete ramp past red and white barriers toward a dark canal, with a massive green neon structure and a distant futuristic skyline framing the view. As the camera rounds a curved walkway, the perspective shifts, moving the green industrial structure to the right while the city skyline becomes more prominent. The scene then opens into a straight promenade where an industrial crane appears on the left and the canal shifts to the right. Finally, the camera advances across the open walkway toward a lone NPC standing beside a cluster of supply crates under the looming city towers.
